title: Demon Slayer: Anata no Boken
description: This is a Choose your own adventure Demon Slayer Datapack/Mod, where you decide your fate in the world
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/mfBlfk1HkV4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This pack is for 26.1 only**﻿




Have you ever wanted to play demon slayer right down to the arcs and the choose your own way of it with you being essentially a main character



well this pack is for you!



this pack contains 24 different breathing styles and 13 blood demon arts and all the breaths have demonic variations



there are also around 7 arcs currently



and several mobs and npcs/characters including some OCs to fill in the gaps


also to give yourself the equipment, use "/function give:"


i hope you all have fun and please watch the video when it comes out ^^
